TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ren'ai Nsgan Ren'ai o gaga Nsgan Nantou, kmpraan kana dxgal o 1,219.39 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 909.39 km², dxgal pmblxan o 201.17 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 14,966, sapah o 4,643, seejiq tnpusu 12,526 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 84% (Embgala, Seejiq, Bunung). Embgala, Seejiq, Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Ren'ai o niqan 16 alang ni maxal 24. 24 o, Alang sasi , Alang tongan , Alang pulan , Alang snuwing , Alang bwarung , Alang toda , Masitoban , Knaziy , Bukai , Malepa , Alang sadu , Alang busi , Alang truwan , Qatu , Alang nakahara , Alang gluban , Qalang kobah , Qalang bayi , Alang marosan , Qalang mb'ala , Alang paran , Alang ruku daya , Sima-un , Qalang bubun . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ɾən'ai nsgan ɾən'ai o gaga nsgan nantou, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o *,***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o **,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu **,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (əmbgala, səəɟiq, bunuŋ). əmbgala, səəɟiq, bunuŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ɾən'ai o niqan ** alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, alaŋ sasi , alaŋ toŋan , alaŋ pulan , alaŋ snuwiŋ , alaŋ bwaɾuŋ , alaŋ toda , masitoban , kna*ij , bukai , maləpa , alaŋ sadu , alaŋ busi , alaŋ tɾuwan , qatu , alaŋ nakaħaɾa , alaŋ gluban , qalaŋ kobaħ , qalaŋ baji , alaŋ maɾosan , qalaŋ mb'ala , alaŋ paɾan , alaŋ ɾuku daja , sima-un , qalaŋ bubun . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Ren'ai Nsgan Ren'ai o gaga Nsgan Nantou, kmpraan kana dxgal o 1,219.39 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 909.39 km², dxgal pmblxan o 201.17 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 14,966, sapah o 4,643, seejiq tnpusu 12,526 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 84% (Embgala, Seejiq, Bunung). Embgala, Seejiq, Bunung ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Ren'ai o niqan 16 alang ni maxal 24. 24 o, Alang sasi , Alang tongan , Alang pulan , Alang snuwing , Alang bwarung , Alang toda , Masitoban , Knaziy , Bukai , Malepa , Alang sadu , Alang busi , Alang truwan , Qatu , Alang nakahara , Alang gluban , Qalang kobah , Qalang bayi , Alang marosan , Qalang mb'ala , Alang paran , Alang ruku daya , Sima-un , Qalang bubun . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ɾən'ai nsgan ɾən'ai o gaga nsgan nantou, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o *,***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o ***.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o **,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu **,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (əmbgala, səəɟiq, bunuŋ). əmbgala, səəɟiq, bunuŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ɾən'ai o niqan ** alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, alaŋ sasi , alaŋ toŋan , alaŋ pulan , alaŋ snuwiŋ , alaŋ bwaɾuŋ , alaŋ toda , masitoban , kna*ij , bukai , maləpa , alaŋ sadu , alaŋ busi , alaŋ tɾuwan , qatu , alaŋ nakaħaɾa , alaŋ gluban , qalaŋ kobaħ , qalaŋ baji , alaŋ maɾosan , qalaŋ mb'ala , alaŋ paɾan , alaŋ ɾuku daja , sima-un , qalaŋ bubun . pusupnjaħan patas
